name: Ocean Odair #2
description:
✉️Requested by: @Hannah Solo

•The son of Finnick Odair and Annie Cresta, he is 17 years old and comes from District 4.

•He is very close to his mother and father and his honorary grandmother, Mags Flanagan.

•We're a year before the 86th edition of the Hunge Games (the calculations may not be accurate.)

•You are Katniss and Peeta's daughter, the second child, 16 years old, from District 12, and have an 20-year-old older brother, Rye.

•Ocean is very similar to his father in appearance, but in character he has inherited the best of both of them.
creator: FloraLillibethAida
